text.div:
LinkIdTextCardinalityTypeDescription & Constraints
Questionnairehttp://fhir.org/guides/who/emcare/Questionnaire/EmCareA.Registration.P#0.1.0
EmCare.A.DE01Unique identifier provided or a universal ID, if used in the country0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE02Auto-generated unique identification if used by the implementation0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE03The client's identity is unknown or the client's prefers to remain anonymous0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE04Client's first name0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE05Client's middle name0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE06Client's family name or last name0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE08The client's date of birth (DOB), if known, OR the estimated date of birth IF not known (see EmCare.A.DE10)0..1dateDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE09The client's time of birth (if <1 day old)0..1timeDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE10Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth0..1decimalDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE11The client and/or Caregiver does not know the date of birth of the client (this is to check whether the age and date of birth are facts or estimations)0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE09').answer.value.answer.value is empty
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE09').answer.value.answer.value is empty
EmCare.A.DE12The client/caregiver will provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE11').answer.value.answer.value = true
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE11').answer.value.answer.value = true
EmCare.A.DE14.1The Caregiver provides the age in weeks/days/hours0..1integerExpressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE12').answer.value.answer.value.code = "EmCare.A.DE13"
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE12').answer.value.answer.value.code = "EmCare.A.DE13"
EmCare.A.DE13.1The age of the client is estimated based on information provided by the caregiver0..1textExpressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE12').answer.value.answer.value.code = "EmCare.A.DE14"
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE12').answer.value.answer.value.code = "EmCare.A.DE14"
EmCare.A.DE15.1Estimated Date of Birth of the Client0..1dateExpressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE12').answer.value.answer.value.code = "EmCare.A.DE15"
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE12').answer.value.answer.value.code = "EmCare.A.DE15"
EmCare.A.DE16The Sex of the client0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
EmCare.A.DE20Client's home address or address that the client is consenting to disclose0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE47the child could have been created from the mother therefore a relatedpersom may already exist0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Value Set: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/ValueSet/relatedperson
newCaregivernull0..1booleanExpressions:
  • Enable When: %"EmCare.A.DE47.answer.value is empty
  • Calculated Value: %"EmCare.A.DE47.answer.value is empty
EmCare.A.DE21The client's primary Caregiver's first name0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
EmCare.A.DE22The client's primary Caregiver's middle name0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
EmCare.A.DE23The client's primary Caregiver's last name0..1textDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
EmCare.A.DE35Client's Caregiver's mobile telephone number0..1stringDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE36Client's Caregiver's home telephone number0..1stringDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE37Client's Caregiver's work telephone number0..1stringDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE38The caregiver wants to receive SMS or other messages regarding the client's contacts/visits and health status0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE46This is needed to link the CommunicationRequest to the Caregiver0..1referenceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.A.DE24The relationship of the primary Caregiver to the client0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE47').answer.value.answer.value is empty
EmCare.A.DE31The client's mother and father's vital status0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE24').answer.value.answer.value is not "EmCare.A.DE25"
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE24').answer.value.answer.value is not "EmCare.A.DE25"
EmCare.A.DE32The client's mother and father's vital status0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Value Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE24').answer.value.answer.value is not "EmCare.A.DE26"
  • Calculated Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE24').answer.value.answer.value is not "EmCare.A.DE26"

Documentation for this format

item.text: Unique identifier provided or a universal ID, if used in the country
Auto-generated unique identification if used by the implementation
The client's identity is unknown or the client's prefers to remain anonymous
Client's first name
Client's middle name
Client's family name or last name
The client's date of birth (DOB), if known, OR the estimated date of birth IF not known (see EmCare.A.DE10)
The client's time of birth (if <1 day old)
Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth
The client and/or Caregiver does not know the date of birth of the client (this is to check whether the age and date of birth are facts or estimations)
The client/caregiver will provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
The Caregiver provides the age in weeks/days/hours
The age of the client is estimated based on information provided by the caregiver
Estimated Date of Birth of the Client
The Sex of the client
Client's home address or address that the client is consenting to disclose
the child could have been created from the mother therefore a relatedpersom may already exist
The client's primary Caregiver's first name
The client's primary Caregiver's middle name
The client's primary Caregiver's last name
Client's Caregiver's mobile telephone number
Client's Caregiver's home telephone number
Client's Caregiver's work telephone number
The caregiver wants to receive SMS or other messages regarding the client's contacts/visits and health status
This is needed to link the CommunicationRequest to the Caregiver
The relationship of the primary Caregiver to the client
The client's mother and father's vital status
